177.reason: [The "+1" is incorrect because readLine() does not include line terminators, so moving to the next line should only consume (lineLen - columnNum) characters, not (lineLen - columnNum + 1). This causes incorrect cursor positioning and may skip characters or miscount line boundaries.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The "+1" is incorrect because readLine() does not include line terminators, so moving to the next line should only consume (lineLen - columnNum) characters, not (lineLen - columnNum + 1). This causes incorrect cursor positioning and may skip characters or miscount line boundaries.]
